chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-89 of 2017. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection. 02. For orders on M.A.No.495/2017 (E/A). 03. For hearing of main case. 02.03.2022 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = The petitioner has sought for his appointment in civil service on the basis of deceased quota. The policy to make appointment of family members of the deceased employee was introduced in year 2002; the father of petitioner has died in year 2001; it was much before introduction of the policy; therefore, the petitioner could not be directed to be appointed in civil service on deceased quota basis. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
